SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-26-2023 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT POLYCULTURE RESEARCH LLC RECOVER FROM APPELLANT FASTAF TECHNOLOGIES, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $400.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,400.00 SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY POLYCULTURE RESEARCH LLC FASTAF TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LYNN. PLAINTIFF POLYCULTURE RESEARCH LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DEVON SAMPSON, OWNER VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT FASTAF TECHNOLOGIES, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANA LIM, ASSISTANT CEO VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. PARTIES AND JPT ALL AGREE TO WAIVE ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST. DEFENDANT STATED THEY HAVE NO EXHIBIT TO SUBMIT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED IN CASE CSM-22-866429. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: OEX OFF CALENDAR

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 (EVENT HAPPENED: 4/01/2022) FILED BY POLYCULTURE RESEARCH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FASTAF TECHNOLOGIES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF POLYCULTURE RESEARCH LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO FILE AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-24-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF POLYCULTURE RESEARCH LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DEVON SAMPSON (OWNER) (VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM). DEFENDANT FASTAF TECHNOLOGIES, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DANA LIM, ASSISTANCE TO CEO (VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM). PLAINTIFF STATED COURT HAS GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCE FOR THIS CASE (CSM-22-866431 AND CSM-22-866429). COURT DOES NOT FIND THAT THERE IS ZOOM REQUEST ON FILE. PLAINTIFF STATED HE HAS ENDORSED FILED COPIES OF ZOOM APPROVAL AND ATTEMPTED TO EMAIL VIA DEPT 506 EMAIL BUT UNSUCCESSFUL AS EMAIL NEVER CAME THROUGH. PLAINTIFF ORALLY STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR SC-109 FORM ARE RECEIVED BY COURTROOM CLERK VIA DEPT 506 EMAIL. COURT DOES NOT ALLOW DEFENDANT'S UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. COURT PROCEEDS THE HEARING AS UNCONTESTED MATTER. CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR PLAINTIFF TO FILE AN AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE TO CORRECT THE ADDRESS FOR SERVICE PRIOR TO THE NEXT COURT DATE. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT NEED TO RE-DO PROOF OF SERVICE. ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
